text:
ふむ……目的は果たせたようだな。
守護輝士には少し手ぬるかったか？

だが……ククク。
その程度で《亡霊》を名乗るなど
笑止千万。

今回は大目に見てやる。
今後も目立つ戦いを続けるなら……
その時は俺が葬ってやる

Hmm... So you've done it, then.
Perhaps it was too simple a task
for a Guardian like yourself.

Remember, a Guardian is still all you are.
Long is the road you must walk before you
can even think of calling yourself a Phantom.

Still, I'll allow you to bask in
your minor accomplishments.
Though if you insist on making your
battles so flashy, I'll end you myself.
